Record Class MemoryInfo

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware.MemoryInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
OSHardwareObject
public record MemoryInfo(long totalPhysical, long availablePhysical, long totalVirtual, long virtualInUse, long swapTotal, long swapUsed, List<MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule> modules) extends Record implements OSHardwareObject
Value object representing system memory information.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule
    Value object for individual physical memory sticks/modules.

  • Constructor Details

    • MemoryInfo

      public MemoryInfo(long totalPhysical, long availablePhysical, long totalVirtual, long virtualInUse, long swapTotal, long swapUsed, List<MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule> modules)
      Creates an instance of a MemoryInfo record class.
      Parameters:
      totalPhysical - the value for the totalPhysical record component
      availablePhysical - the value for the availablePhysical record component
      totalVirtual - the value for the totalVirtual record component
      virtualInUse - the value for the virtualInUse record component
      swapTotal - the value for the swapTotal record component
      swapUsed - the value for the swapUsed record component
      modules - the value for the modules record component

  • Method Details

    • usedPhysical

      public long usedPhysical()

    • usagePercent

      public double usagePercent()

    • totalFormatted

      public String totalFormatted()

    • availableFormatted

      public String availableFormatted()

    • isUnderPressure

      public boolean isUnderPressure(double thresholdPercent)
      True if used memory exceeds the given threshold percentage (e.g. 90.0 for 90%).

    • isCritical

      public boolean isCritical()
      True if memory usage is critically high (above 90%).

    • isSwapping

      public boolean isSwapping()
      True if any swap is currently being used.

    • swapUsagePercent

      public double swapUsagePercent()
      Swap usage as a percentage (0–100).

    • moduleCount

      public int moduleCount()
      Number of memory modules installed.

    • memoryTypes

      public List<String> memoryTypes()
      All distinct memory types present (e.g. DDR4, DDR5).

    • clockSpeeds

      public List<Long> clockSpeeds()
      All distinct clock speeds present across modules, in Hz.

    • hasMismatchedSpeeds

      public boolean hasMismatchedSpeeds()
      True if modules are running at different clock speeds (mismatched kit).

    • totalModuleCapacity

      public long totalModuleCapacity()
      Total capacity of all installed modules in bytes.

    • findModuleByBank

      public Optional<MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule> findModuleByBank(String bankLabel)
      Find a module by its bank label (e.g. "ChannelA-DIMM0").

    • modulesByManufacturer

      public List<MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule> modulesByManufacturer(String manufacturer)
      Modules from a specific manufacturer.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
